zh.lifeSummary: 當Przemysł Piast於大約1260年出生時，他的父親Władysław I Piast37歲，母親Eufemia Princess Of Kalisch38歲。他和Anna Piastówna至少有1個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1306年5月7日享年47歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Przemysł Piast于大约1260年出生时，他的父亲Władysław I Piast37岁，母亲Eufemia Princess Of Kalisch38岁。他和Anna Piastówna至少有1个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于1306年5月7日享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: Piast
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of French and Walloon Piat: from the personal name Piat, from the Latin name Piatus ‘expiated’ (from the past participle of the verb pio ‘to appease; to expiate’). The name was borne by Saint Piatus of Tournai (in Wallonia, Belgium), who was martyred under the Roman Emperor Maximian c. 286 AD . Altered ending of the surname reflects the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t. Compare Pyatt .
English (Lancashire and Cheshire): variant of   Pyatt  .

History: This surname (see 1 above) is listed along with the variant Pyatt in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Pyatt
meanings: English (mainly Staffordshire): nickname either from Middle English piot ‘magpie’ (Old French pïot, a diminutive of Old French pie), commonly used to denote a chattering woman, or alternatively from an unrecorded Middle English pyard, an uncomplimentary term derived from the same Old French word + -(h)ard. Compare Pye .
Variant of   Piatt  , a surname of French and Walloon origin.
History: This surname (see 2 above) is listed along with the variant Piatt in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors.

en.lifeSummary: When Przemysł Piast was born about 1260, his father, Władysław I Piast, was 37 and his mother, Eufemia Princess Of Kalisch, was 38. He had at least 1 son and 3 daughters with Anna Piastówna. He died on 7 May 1306, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Przemysł Piast est né environ 1260, son père, Władysław I Piast, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Eufemia Princess Of Kalisch, avait 38 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles avec Anna Piastówna. Il est décédé le 7 mai 1306, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Przemysł Piast um 1260 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Władysław I Piast 37 und seine Mutter Eufemia Princess Of Kalisch 38. Er hatte mit Anna Piastówna mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 7. Mai 1306 im Alter von 47 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Przemysł Piast è nato il circa 1260, il suo padre, Władysław I Piast, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Eufemia Princess Of Kalisch, aveva 38 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie con Anna Piastówna. Morì il 7 maggio 1306, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Przemysł Piastが約1260年に生まれた時，父Władysław I Piastは37歳，母Eufemia Princess Of Kalischは38歳であった。彼はAnna Piastównaとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1306年5月7日に47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Przemysł Piast(이)가 대략 1260년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Władysław I Piast(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Eufemia Princess Of Kalisch(은)는 38세였다. 그는 Anna Piastówna(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1306년 5월 7일 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Przemysł Piast nasceu aproximadamente 1260, seu pai, Władysław I Piast, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Eufemia Princess Of Kalisch, tinha 38 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas com Anna Piastówna. Ele faleceu em 7 de maio de 1306, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Przemysł Piast родился около 1260 г., его отцу по имени Władysław I Piast было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Eufemia Princess Of Kalisch, 38. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери от Anna Piastówna. Он умер 7 мая 1306 г. в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Przemysł Piast nació aproximadamente 1260, su papá, Władysław I Piast, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Eufemia Princess Of Kalisch, tenía 38 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas con Anna Piastówna. Murió el 7 de mayo de 1306, a la edad de 47 años.
